title: HB: basic 1-segment fit
summary: Fit a single-segment Hierarchical Bayes model with default sampling settings.

title: HB: 2-segment fit with holdout
summary: Fit a 2-segment HB mixture with a separate holdout for out-of-sample evaluation.
